lines: The niche stands open. Broken seal stone surrounds the place where Sapphira waited. Nothing remains to answer the pins.
The pins hold Keziah's last cadence. Twelve names have been pressed into fresh wax across the niche seal.
Sapphira does not answer, and the seal gives no reason to call that safety.
The listening wire has gone still. A long face presses faintly against the back of the seal, turned north.
Opening the niche now would undo the quieting.

effects.log: You leave the listening niche sealed.

choices.label: Mark the seal for a later judgment

effects.log: The niche is quiet, not empty.

choices.label: Undo the quieting and open the niche

lines: The pins are holding Sapphira in Keziah's cadence. Releasing them will wake him before the niche can open clear.

choices.label: Release the pins and face Sapphira

effects.log: The quieting pins lift. Sapphira pulls one prayer-bound hand free as the niche opens.

lines: A fresh crack divides the seal. Pale fingertips meet behind it in a prayer grip that has not fully fused.
The opening pins can release the niche now. The body behind it is breathing.

effects.log: Sapphira Rufa waits behind the cracked niche seal.

lines: Measurement cuts climb the niche stone by finger widths. A copper pin enters at the height of a man's jaw.
The ash at the base is newly disturbed. Something behind the wall has been turning toward Hallowfen.

effects.log: The measurements name Sapphira Rufa as the subject inside.
